description_long: This is a hexagonal above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a bright blue water interior. The jacuzzi features a metal ladder at the front for easy entry and exit, and a set of three wooden steps leading up to the ladder. On one side, there is an external orange filtration or pump unit connected to the jacuzzi, indicating a functional water circulation system. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the tub, with the waterline just below the top edge. The structure is set on a flat, light-colored base, and the overall design is modern and suitable for outdoor urban environments such as backyards, parks, or communal spaces.
description: A hexagonal wooden jacuzzi with a blue water interior, metal ladder, and external filtration unit. It features three wooden steps and is nearly full of water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal ladder and three wooden steps leading up to the jacuzzi, with the water surface clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external orange filtration unit and the side profile of the wooden steps.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the filtration unit and the back side of the jacuzzi, with the water surface visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing both the filtration unit and the steps, providing a comprehensive look at the jacuzzi's features.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water level just below the top edge
